feed.title: Rights To Ricky Sanchez: The Sixers Podcast (filtered)

entry.title: [RTRS] Are The Sixers Really A Finalist For LeBron James? Have Embiid and Brown Talked?
entry.summary:
Everyone seems to think the Sixers are LeBron's short list. So what's going to happen? Also, the Summer League Sixers get slaughtered by the Rockets, and what is going on with Joel Embiid and Jaylen Brown?
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Adam Ksebe is the official realtor of The Ricky at 302-864-8643 or https://www.buyindelaware.com/ Get 20% off Verb Energy bars with code RTRS and the VERB starter pack at https://verbenergy.com/ricky Kornblau Law is the official law firm of the process Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky
entry.content:
Everyone seems to think the Sixers are LeBron's short list. So what's going to happen? Also, the Summer League Sixers get slaughtered by the Rockets, and what is going on with Joel Embiid and Jaylen Brown?

entry.title: [RTRS] Summer Sixers Winning, LeBron Watch, More Jaylen Brown Thoughts
entry.summary:
Mike is off hosting duties as Spike is back to discuss the sizzling Summer League Sixers, whether or not he wants LeBron James to choose the Sixers, and how his thoughts have developed on the Jaylen Brown trade.

entry.title: [RTRS] Summer League Sixers Start, LeBron Sweepstakes Continue
entry.summary:
Mike is joined by Shamus Clancy to discuss Labaron Philon and the Summer League Sixers, iced oat cortados, the hunt for LeBron James, and Shamus’ thoughts on the Jaylen Brown trade., and Adam Aron tweeting then deleting Taylor Swift’s wedding.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com Get 20% off Verb Energy bars with code RTRS and the VERB starter pack at https://verbenergy.com/ricky

entry.title: [RTRS] Sixers Trade For Jaylen Brown?!
entry.summary:
The Sixers traded Paul George, two first round picks and two second round picks to the Celtics for Paul George. Wild. entry.title: [RTRS] Free Agency Begins, Sixers Haven't Done Anything, LeBron Leaving LA, Ben Simmons Speaks
entry.summary:
Free agency has begun in the NBA. The Sixers haven't done much yet, but we talk about it anyway, as well as the rest of the moves throughout the NBA including LeBron leaving the Lakers and the Raptors trading for Kawhi. Then we talk about the recent interview with Ben Simmons in Men's Health.
Thumbnail photo credit: Rose Marie Cromwell for Men’s Health
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. Adam Ksebe is the official realtor of The Ricky at 302-864-8643 or https://www.buyindelaware.com/ Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky
entry.content:
Free agency has begun in the NBA. The Sixers haven't done much yet, but we talk about it anyway, as well as the rest of the moves throughout the NBA including LeBron leaving the Lakers and the Raptors trading for Kawhi. Then we talk about the recent interview with Ben Simmons in Men's Health.

Thumbnail photo credit: Rose Marie Cromwell for Men’s Health

entry.title: [RTRS] Revisiting The Labaron Philon Pick, Should The Sixers Sign Mitchell Robinson, LaMelo Trade
entry.summary:
We check in on Mike's well-being and thoughts on the Sixers selection of Labaron Philon in the NBA Draft, and what it means for the franchise moving forward. Then we talk about the LaMelo Ball trade, and finally preview free agency, including whether we'd like a mid-level exception signing of former Knicks center Mitchell Robinson.
Watch the Philon breakdown Mike mentioned here: https://youtu.be/2EwhHmwBsSI?is=Z6ATyKH08MyX723N
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Anthony Degli Obizzi is the official Financial Planner of The Ricky, text RICKY to 484-471-4873 to set up a conversation Get 20% off Verb Energy bars with code RTRS and the VERB starter pack at https://verbenergy.com/ricky Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky

Predictions offer void in New York. Ends July 19th. Terms at d k n g dot c o slash audio.
entry.content:
We check in on Mike's well-being and thoughts on the Sixers selection of Labaron Philon in the NBA Draft, and what it means for the franchise moving forward. Then we talk about the LaMelo Ball trade, and finally preview free agency, including whether we'd like a mid-level exception signing of former Knicks center Mitchell Robinson.

entry.title: [RTRS] Sixers Take Labaron Philon, Bucks Trade Giannis
entry.summary:
The Sixers took Alabama (small) guard Labaron Philon Jr. with the #22 pick in the draft. We talk about it. The Bucks traded Giannis, we talk about it.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. entry.title: [RTRS] Mike Gansey's Phillies Jinx, Joel Embiid's Replacement, Dolan's Speech To The Knicks
entry.summary:
Mike Gansey jinxed Jesus Luzardo in an incredibly Sixers debut at the Phillies game. We discuss potential Joel Embiid replacements with the 22nd pick, talk about the Knicks upcoming parade, and James Dolan's speech to the team before the playoffs.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Kornblau Law is the official law firm of the process Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky
entry.content:

entry.title: [RTRS] The New York Knicks Are NBA Champions
entry.summary:
A total disaster has occurred as the New York Knicks have won the NBA title. We talk about the series, the former Sixers who helped, and the guys the Sixers should have gotten. Then we get into a few listener takes on Mike Gansey’s ‘Yeah’ song, some draft talk, and who the next worst possible NBA champion could be.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Become a MortgageCS Ricky VIP at mortgagecs.com/ricky Get 20% off Verb Energy bars with code RTRS and the VERB starter pack at https://verbenergy.com/ricky New from Stateside Vodka, try Super Lyte variety packs, and individual flavors, at stores and bars near you.

Connecticut: call eight eight eight seven eight nine seven seven seven seven, visit CCPG dot org. On behalf of Boot Hill Casino in Kansas. Bet tax pass-through may apply in Illinois. Twenty one plus. Void in Ontario. Event contract trading with DraftKings Predictions involves risk of loss. Sportsbook Bonus bets expire in seven days. $50 in Predictions Dollars issued weekly for three weeks, expire in one year. Redeem one non-withdrawable reward. Availability varies. Predictions offer void in New York. Ends June 28th. Terms at d k n g dot c o slash audio.

entry.title: [RTRS] Mike Gansey Talks, Wings The Sixers Could Draft At 22
entry.summary:
We talk about the NBA Finals, Mike Gansey's opening press conference, and The Ricky's Beckett Sanderson joins us to talk about wings the Sixers could take with the 22nd pick.

entry.title: [RTRS] Was Gansey A Good Hire? The Knicks Might Win It All, Sixth Man Embiid
entry.summary:
Sixers Adam fills in for Mike as we dig on on what makes Mike Gansey a good or bad hire. Then we talk about the Knicks potentially winning the NBA title, revisit Spike's contrarian view on Wemby, if Chet had a worse meltdown than Ben Simmons, and a listener question about Joel Embiid as a sixth man.
The Rights To RIcky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Adam Ksebe is the official realtor of The Ricky at 302-864-8643 or https://www.buyindelaware.com/ LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. entry.title: [RTRS] Wemby vs. The Knicks, Ben Simmons vs. Chet Holmgren, Mike's Draft Corner
entry.summary:
The NBA Finals are starting, we talk about the Spurs vs the Knicks, and Chet Holmgren's Ben Simmons-like breakdown. Then we talk about three players the Sixers could take at #22 in the NBA Draft.

entry.title: [RTRS] Does The Knicks Being In The Finals Make You Feel Better Or Worse, McCain Thrives, Sixers Grades
entry.summary:
The Knicks are in the Finals, some are saying it makes them feel better about the Sixers. Does it for us? Jared McCain starts a Western Conference Finals game and Wemby sends his goons after him. And we give our final grades for Justin Edwards, Paul George, Tyrese Maxey and Joel Embiid.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. Become a MortgageCS Ricky VIP at mortgagecs.com/ricky Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky
entry.content:
The Knicks are in the Finals, some are saying it makes them feel better about the Sixers. Does it for us? Jared McCain starts a Western Conference Finals game and Wemby sends his goons after him. And we give our final grades for Justin Edwards, Paul George, Tyrese Maxey and Joel Embiid.


The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook
Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com

entry.title: [RTRS] Jared McCain Goes Off, Grading The 25-26 Sixers, Jameer Nelson's President Candidacy
entry.summary: Jared McCain is playing a lot for the Thunder, including a 24 point performance in OKC's Game 3 win. We talk about how McCain looks and rehash the trade, give out grades for almost all of the current Sixers, and talk about the report that Jameer Nelson is an internal candidate for the Sixers open President of Basketball Operations position. The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook Get 20% off any Body Bio order with the code in the podcast. Anthony Degli Obizzi is the official Financial Planner of The Ricky, text RICKY to 484-471-4873 to set up a conversation LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky.

entry.title: [RTRS] So Is Bob Myers Running The Sixers Or Not?
entry.summary:
Josh Harris and Bob Myers spoke this week. We talk about what they said. We also address the question of whether Daryl Morey was right in a debate with Mike, whether Woj should be GM, and an SNL cast member stole Mike's bit.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. entry.title: [RTRS] Daryl Morey Out, We're Still Here
entry.summary:
We discuss the Sixers decision to move on from Ricky co-host Daryl Morey. Thanks for all the pods Daryl, you still owe us one. entry.title: [RTRS] The Sixers Season Ends In Embarrassing Fashion, As It Always Does
entry.summary:
The Sixers were swept by the Knicks on Mother's Day. Mike didn't handle it well. Thank you for sticking with us for yet another season.
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook Get 20% off Verb Energy bars with code RTRS and the VERB starter pack at https://verbenergy.com/ricky Become a MortgageCS Ricky VIP at mortgagecs.com/ricky Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky.

entry.title: [RTRS] Disgusting! Sixers Lose To Knicks, Down 3-0
entry.summary:
The Sixers go down 3-0 against the Knicks. Maxey doesn’t look like Maxey, the bench continues to be nonexistent, and no one can rebound. At least they beat the Celtics.

entry.content:
The Sixers go down 3-0 against the Knicks. Maxey doesn’t look like Maxey, the bench continues to be nonexistent, and no one can rebound. At least they beat the Celtics.

entry.title: [RTRS] WE WANT BOSTON! SIXERS FORCE A GAME SIX AGAINST THE CELTICS
entry.summary:
Joel Embiid dominated the Celtics inside, and the Sixers held the Celtics to 11 points in the fourth quarter, winning game five and forcing a game six. Eat shit, Celtics fans if you're listening to this.

entry.title: [RTRS] The Sixers Are In The Postseason, What Do We Want Out Of It?
entry.summary: The Sixers beat the Bucks, and the Magic lost to the backup Celtics, so the Sixers will host the play-in game on Wednesday in Philadelphia. We talk about what we’re hoping to get out of the play-in and playoffs, more on the Embiid and his appendicitis, an amazing clip of Michael Rubin talking about the White Party, and Mike gets to hear the new Doc Rivers song as he gets fired. Donate to Spike’s Walk For Paws fundraiser for the BVSPCA here: https://secure.qgiv.com/event/2026walkforpaws/account/2277596/ The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook Anthony Degli Obizzi is the official Financial Planner of The Ricky, text RICKY to 484-471-4873 to set up a conversation Get 20% off Verb Energy bars with code RTRS at https://verbenergy.com/ricky Become a MortgageCS Ricky VIP at mortgagecs.com/ricky Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky.
entry.content:
The Sixers beat the Bucks, and the Magic lost to the backup Celtics, so the Sixers will host the play-in game on Wednesday in Philadelphia. We talk about what we’re hoping to get out of the play-in and playoffs, more on the Embiid and his appendicitis, an amazing clip of Michael Rubin talking about the White Party, and Mike gets to hear the new Doc Rivers song as he gets fired.

entry.title: [RTRS] Joel Embiid's Appendix Surgery, Sixers Lose To The Rockets, Doc Rivers Is Full Of It (Again)
entry.summary:
Joel Embiid has had many different injuries for the Sixers, but this is his first appendicitis. Joel Embiid had surgery on Thursday, just hours before the game against the Rockets. The Sixers will likely be without him for the play in and first round of the playoffs, if they make it. We talk about the situation, and the loss to the Rockets.

entry.title: [RTRS] Avoiding The Play In, Embiid vs. Morey, Booing Tobias
entry.summary:
The Sixers split their home back to back with the Pistons and the Wolves. We talk about the games, Joel Embiid’s public disagreement with the Sixers on his health and whether he should have played vs the Wizards, and whether fans should boo Tobias Harris. entry.title: [RTRS] Paul George Is Cookin', Sixers Defense and Rebounding, Drummond's Corner Threes
entry.summary:
The Sixers beat the Wizards, and Sixers Adam joins Spike and Mike to talk about it. We discuss Paul George's play since his return, the Sixers issues on defense and rebounding, potentially playing Adem Bona with Embiid, and Andre Drummond's corner threes. Then we tell Adam how to hide in the Sixers film sessions, talk about what Evan Turner's problem is, and congratulate Doc Rivers.
Donate to Spike’s Walk For Paws fundraiser for the BVSPCA here: https://secure.qgiv.com/event/2026walkforpaws/account/2277596/
The Rights To Ricky Sanchez is presented by Draft Kings Sportsbook LL Pavorsky Jewelers is where Rights To Ricky Sanchez listeners go and get engaged. Briggs Auction is the official auction of The Ricky at briggsauction.com Kornblau Law is the official law firm of the process Surfside Iced Tea and Vodka is the official canned cocktail of The Ricky.
entry.content:
The Sixers beat the Wizards, and Sixers Adam joins Spike and Mike to talk about it. We discuss Paul George's play since his return, the Sixers issues on defense and rebounding, potentially playing Adem Bona with Embiid, and Andre Drummond's corner threes. Then we tell Adam how to hide in the Sixers film sessions, talk about what Evan Turner's problem is, and congratulate Doc Rivers.
